purpose: Resolve merge conflicts between a PR branch and the default branch.

pr.description: GitHub PR number whose branch has conflicts with the default branch.

prefer.description: Force one side for every conflict: 'ours' = PR branch (HEAD), 'theirs' = base branch. Omit to let the agent merge by judgement.

success: resolve completes and returns a valid canonical result
failure: resolve cannot return a valid canonical result
